headline: All Hail King Jesus: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: All Hail King Jesus carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 78.25, led by Jaxon Smith-Njigba, Amon-Ra St. Brown, and Tee Higgins. The clearest lineup pressure point is the RB slot held by Zach Charbonnet at 51.6 C-AVI.

recent_trades.summary: On July 13, All Hail King Jesus traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (original roster 13) while sending Derrick Henry. Isiah Pacheco is now on the current roster at 47.5 C-AVI and 63.4 D-AVI. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jaxon Smith-Njigba (99.1), Amon-Ra St. Brown (98.6), and Tee Higgins (81.9).

sections.title: Recent Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 13, All Hail King Jesus traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (original roster 13) while sending Derrick Henry. Isiah Pacheco is now on the current roster at 47.5 C-AVI and 63.4 D-AVI. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Zach Charbonnet is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 51.6. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 10 offensive players, with 2 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 71.52.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 10 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
